zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillip de Egerton於大約1255年出生在英國爾艾格頓時，他的父親David Egerton29歲，母親Cecily Thornton35歲。他於1276年與Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x在英國英格蘭爾艾格頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1315年在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國爾艾格頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillip de Egerton于大约1255年出生在英国爾艾格頓时，他的父亲David Egerton29岁，母亲Cecily Thornton35岁。他于1276年与Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x在英国英格兰爾艾格頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1315年在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国爾艾格頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillip de Egerton was born about 1255, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, his father, David Egerton, was 29 and his mother, Cecily Thornton, was 35. He married Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x in 1276, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1315, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Egerton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillip d’Egerton est né environ 1255, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, David Egerton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Cecily Thornton, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x en 1276, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1315, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillip de Egerton um 1255 in Egerton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Egerton 29 und seine Mutter Cecily Thornton 35. Er hat 1276 in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1315 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Egerton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillip de Egerton è nato il circa 1255 nel Egerton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, David Egerton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Thornton, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x nel 1276, nel Egerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1315, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Egerton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillip de Egertonが約1255年にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父David Egertonは29歳，母Cecily Thorntonは35歳であった。1276年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンでLady Margaret De Wrenbury xと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1315年に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillip de Egerton(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Egerton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Thornton(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 거턴에서 Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 거턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillip de Egerton nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, David Egerton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Thornton, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x em 1276, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1315, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillip de Egerton родился около 1255 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени David Egerton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Thornton, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x в 1276 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1315 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillip de Egerton nació aproximadamente 1255, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, David Egerton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Cecily Thornton, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x en 1276, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1315, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
